hero.description: I’m a full-stack web developer based in Morocco, helping startups, businesses, and teams build modern, scalable web applications. I focus on performance, SEO, and clean user experiences to deliver real business impact.

I’ve also worked on real-world projects, helping businesses build websites, automate workflows, and improve their digital presence.

services_page.title: Services
services_page.subtitle: What I Offer
services_page.heading: Web Development, SEO & AI Automation Solutions in Morocco
services_page.description: Looking for a professional in web development, SEO optimization, or AI automation in Morocco? I build SEO-optimized websites, create AI-powered business automation systems, and design high-converting social media ads. Trusted by startups and enterprises to deliver measurable results, increase online visibility, and drive sales growth.

web.title: Secure & SEO-Optimized Website Development
web.description: I build fast, secure, and SEO-optimized websites using modern technologies — focused on performance, mobile-friendly design, and user experience that helps your business rank higher on Google and turn visitors into real clients.
web.startDescription: Every website I build starts with one clear goal:
web.longDescription: Get found, generate traffic, and convert visitors into paying customers. I use modern frameworks combined with solid SEO architecture, fast loading performance, and clean, scalable code that's built to last. I also integrate Google Analytics and Google Search Console so you can track performance, monitor traffic, and improve your rankings over time — from proper indexing to keyword optimization, your website is built to be visible and competitive from day one.
web.company_recruitment: I also collaborate with teams and companies on development projects.
web.benefitsDesc: By working with me on your website, you can expect:
web.processDesc: I follow a clear and focused process to make sure your project launches on time and on target:
web.techDesc: I choose the right technologies based on your project requirements and business goals — not trends.

The goal is simple: eliminate the bottlenecks that slow you down so you can focus entirely on growth.

about_page.title: About Me
about_page.heading: Developer & designer focused on building real, impactful solutions
about_page.intro: I’m a full-stack web developer who builds modern, high-performance web applications. I help businesses and teams create fast, scalable, and user-focused digital products, with a strong focus on performance, SEO, and real-world results.

whoIAm.title: Who I Am
whoIAm.paragraph1: I'm Mohammed elghandori, a full-stack developer, SEO specialist, and designer passionate about turning ideas into high-performing digital products. I hold a diploma in Digital Full-Stack Development from ISTA and a diploma in Architecte en Technologies du Numérique from 1337 School UM6P, (part of the prestigious 42 Network). I also have certifications in web development, digital marketing, and AI. Through my studies, I built a strong foundation in computer science, including how the web works, core computer architecture concepts such as memory and the kernel, data structures and algorithms, and the fundamentals of software development. I actively participate in hackathons and Attend tech community events to gain experience and stay up to date with the latest technologies.
whoIAm.paragraph2: I believe in quality craftsmanship, clear communication, and measurable results. I'm committed to helping you succeed online with solutions that work, because your success is my success.

experience.title: My Experience & Background
experience.paragraph: I've worked with enterprises, startups, and small businesses to build real digital solutions that deliver results. I've developed full-stack web applications, configured servers for optimal performance, and built automation systems that save hours of manual work daily. I've designed hundreds of social media ad visuals that helped businesses increase engagement and sales. I've also won first place in multiple hackathons I participated in, competing against talented developers and building innovative solutions under pressure. From setting up SEO-friendly architectures to deploying AI-powered workflows, every project I take on is focused on one thing: getting you measurable outcomes.

storyMissionValues.title: Discover the story, mission, and values that drive me
storyMissionValues.story: My journey started with a curiosity for how the web works and how businesses can use it to grow. Over the years I've built websites, automated processes, and designed campaigns for brands that needed a partner who could both code and design and deliver on time.
storyMissionValues.mission: My mission is to help businesses and creators build a strong, visible online presence. I want every project to be fast, findable, and focused on the user so you can focus on what you do best while your digital presence works for you.
values: Quality over quantity — every line of code and every pixel matters.
Transparency — you're always in the loop, from kickoff to launch.
Partnership — I succeed when your business grows.

projects.title: Corporate Website & SEO Growth
projects.description: Designed and developed a high-performance corporate website to showcase services and products. Optimized for speed, SEO, and user experience, resulting in 2,900+ new users in just 2 months and improved online visibility.

seo.title: Corporate Website & SEO Case Study | Devsign Morocco
seo.description: Case study: a Next.js corporate website with technical SEO and performance tuning that reached 2,900+ new users in two months built to convert and scale.

detail.intro: This engagement was about more than a polished homepage: the business needed a credible digital presence that could rank, loads fast on any device, and turns visitors into real clients. We built a structured, crawl-friendly site map with clear service and product pages, metadata, and internal linking patterns that match how people actually search for the company’s offerings.

sections.title: Challenge & approach
sections.body: We started from scratch, beginning with a deep analysis of the business, its goals, and target audience. From there, we moved into the conception phase and designed clear user flows, followed by Figma prototypes to visualize the experience. Once validated, we built a fast, SEO-friendly website using modern technologies, focusing on performance, clean structure, and easy content management for future updates.

sections.title: Results & impact
sections.body: Within the first two months after launch, analytics showed more than 2,900 new users — a strong signal that discoverability and performance were working together. The site continues to serve as a scalable foundation for new services and campaigns.

highlights: Performance-first implementation with SEO-friendly routing and metadata
Mobile-responsive layout tested across common breakpoints
Clear information architecture for services, trust, and conversion paths
Measurable traction: 2,900+ new users in two months post-launch

projects.title: Business Automation Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a custom dashboard to centralize client management, subscriptions, and business operations. Automated tracking of billing cycles, stock, and service status reduced manual work, improved organization, and increased overall efficiency and client satisfaction.

seo.title: Business Automation Dashboard Case Study | React & Node | Devsign
seo.description: Custom client portal and operations dashboard: subscriptions, stock, pricing, and expiry alerts — built with React, Node.js, and REST APIs for real enterprises.

detail.intro: Operations were spread across spreadsheets and files. We replaced this with a single dashboard that reflects the customer lifecycle from subscription to renewal, with alerts before revenue is lost.

sections.title: Solution
sections.body: An interface displaying active plans, expiration dates, inventory, and price history. Automated alerts reduce manual follow-up, allowing the team to focus on sales and service.

highlights: Centralized view of clients, subscriptions, and stock
Automated alerts for expiring services and critical thresholds
REST-backed architecture ready to extend with new modules
Designed for daily operations on desktop and tablet

projects.title: E-commerce Landing Page
projects.description: Designed a high-conversion landing page for product promotion and advertising campaigns. Optimized for fast loading, mobile experience, and clear product presentation, helping increase user engagement and conversion rates. Integrated with a dashboard for real-time content updates and campaign optimization.

seo.title: E-commerce Landing Page Fast & Mobile-friendly & SEO optimized | Devsign
seo.description: A high-conversion landing page designed for modern retail. Focused on lightning-fast performance, mobile responsiveness, and SEO-friendly structure to maximize customer engagement.

detail.intro: Modern e-commerce demands speed, clarity, and flexibility. Beyond performance, we built this landing page with a connected dashboard that lets teams update content, promotions, and sections instantly — without touching code. The result is a fast, mobile-optimized experience combined with full control over messaging and conversion flow.

sections.title: Smart build & content control
sections.body: The page is structured with clean semantic sections, optimized assets, and a scalable system for performance and maintainability. Motion and animations are used throughout to guide user attention and improve engagement. We also integrate images and forms to clearly explain the service or product. On top of that, a custom dashboard empowers teams to edit text, images, offers, CTAs, and motion settings in real time. This ensures the landing page stays fresh, relevant, and aligned with marketing campaigns across SEO, social media, and paid ads.

highlights: Mobile-first layout and touch-friendly interactions
Performance-conscious assets and CSS strategy
SEO-oriented headings and content hierarchy
Clear CTA path from hero through objections to action

projects.title: Social Media Design & Ads
projects.description: Created high-converting social media visuals by transforming simple product images into professional marketing content. Each design includes clear messaging, branding, and CTA elements to increase engagement.

seo.title: Social Media Ad Design Case Study | High-Converting Creatives | Devsign
seo.description: Social ads and feed creatives built for clarity, branding, and conversion — Photoshop & Illustrator workflow for campaigns that need scroll-stopping visuals.

detail.intro: We design high-performing social media creatives tailored for Facebook and Instagram ad campaigns. For multiple clients across different industries, we transform product and service ideas into clear, engaging visuals that highlight the offer, communicate value instantly, and guide users toward action.

sections.title: Ad-focused design approach
sections.body: Each design is built to capture attention in fast-scrolling feeds using strong visuals, balanced colors, and clear typography. We highlight the product or service, add compelling titles, and integrate effective CTAs such as 'Shop Now' or 'Send Message'. Whether promoting a product or a service, the goal is always the same: explain the offer quickly, attract attention, and drive conversions through consistent and impactful design.

highlights: Product-forward compositions with readable messaging at small sizes
Brand-aligned palettes and typography for cohesive campaigns
CTA-forward layouts optimized for paid social placements
Source files and exports matched to common ad specs

projects.title: Pesscore eFootball Tracker
projects.description: A social competitive platform for eFootball players to log match results, track head-to-head statistics, and verify game data through a real-time notification and approval system.
projects.tech: React, Node.js, REST API, MySQL, WebSocket

seo.title: Pesscore eFootball Tracker | React, MySQL, WebSockets | Devsign
seo.description: Community competitive platform for eFootball: verified match results, H2H stats, approvals, and realtime notifications — React, Node, MySQL.

detail.intro: Pesscore started from a simple problem: match results between friends were getting lost in chats and notes. It evolved into a full social platform where eFootball players can log matches, track head-to-head stats, and validate results through a shared approval system — turning casual games into structured competition.

sections.title: Product experience
sections.body: The platform focuses on simplicity and trust. Players can log matches, view history with friends, and track performance over time. Every result is verified through a two-sided approval system: when a match is submitted, the opponent receives a notification and must confirm or reject it, ensuring accurate and trusted rankings.

sections.title: Architecture & real-time system
sections.body: The application is built with a decoupled architecture: a React frontend served on a dedicated client server, and a backend running on a separate server exposing REST APIs. Communication between both layers is handled through HTTP endpoints, while WebSockets enable real-time notifications for match validation and updates. The backend combines Node.js (Express) and a Rust service for performance-critical logic, with MySQL ensuring consistent data storage and relationships.

sections.title: What we learned
sections.body: This project strengthened our ability to design real-world products from idea to deployment. We gained experience in REST API design, frontend-backend separation, real-time communication with WebSockets, and building trust-based systems with validation workflows. It also improved our skills in scalable architecture, database modeling, and delivering user-focused features driven by actual needs.

highlights: Match logging with head-to-head history
Approval workflow to reduce false reporting
Realtime updates for a responsive community UX
API-driven architecture ready for mobile clients later

projects.title: Math Multiplication Game
projects.description: An interactive educational tool designed to help students master math skills. Features dynamic difficulty scaling and a clean, responsive UI built with vanilla JavaScript and Bootstrap.

seo.title: Math Multiplication Game | Educational Web App | JavaScript | Devsign
seo.description: Interactive multiplication practice for students: adaptive difficulty, responsive Bootstrap UI, and lightweight vanilla JavaScript — fast on mobile.

detail.intro: Learning tools should feel instant and encouraging. This game focuses on tight feedback loops: quick rounds, progressive difficulty, and a UI that stays readable on phones where most students actually practice.

sections.title: Pedagogy + UX
sections.body: The difficulty curve is designed to keep learners in the challenge zone without frustration. Visual hierarchy and large tap targets reduce cognitive load so attention stays on the math.

sections.title: Technical simplicity
sections.body: Built with vanilla JavaScript for minimal overhead and fast loads, while Bootstrap ensures a responsive layout that works across devices. The codebase is clean and modular, making it easy to extend with new features or subjects in the future.

highlights: Dynamic difficulty scaling for varied skill levels
Mobile-friendly layout with Bootstrap components
Vanilla JS for minimal overhead and fast loads
Great example of approachable UX for broad audiences

projects.title: Minishell Project
projects.description: A custom Unix shell built from scratch in C. Replicates core Bash functionalities including command execution, piping, redirections, and environment variable management with strict memory control.

seo.title: Minishell Project, Unix Shell in C, Systems Programming | Devsign
seo.description: Academic deep-dive: custom Unix shell in C with pipes, redirections, env vars, and strict memory discipline — foundational systems engineering.

detail.intro: Minishell is a deep dive into how operating systems handle command execution and process control. By building a custom shell from scratch in C, we replicated core Unix behaviors — from parsing user input to executing commands, managing processes, and handling pipes and redirections with precision.

sections.title: Technical depth
sections.body: The project focuses on accurate shell behavior, including command parsing, quoting rules, environment variable expansion, and signal handling (Ctrl+C, Ctrl+D, Ctrl+\). It implements pipes, input/output redirections, and process creation using fork/exec, while ensuring memory safety and robust error handling across edge cases.

sections.title: What we learned
sections.body: This project strengthened our understanding of low-level system programming: process lifecycle, inter-process communication (pipes), file descriptors, and POSIX standards. It also improved our ability to manage complex parsing logic, handle signals correctly, and write clean, reliable C code under strict constraints — essential skills for systems and backend engineering.

highlights: Command execution with pipelines and redirections
Environment variable handling aligned with shell semantics
Memory-safe discipline appropriate to low-level C code
Strong foundation for backend and infrastructure work

projects.title: Webserv Project
projects.description: A high-performance, non-blocking HTTP server built in C++98. Inspired by Nginx, it uses epoll() for multiplexing and supports CGI, file uploads, and RFC-compliant request handling.

seo.title: Webserv HTTP Server | C++ epoll & CGI | Networking Case Study | Devsign
seo.description: Custom non-blocking HTTP server in C++98 with epoll multiplexing, CGI, uploads, and RFC-oriented request handling — core server engineering skills.

detail.intro: Building a custom web server from scratch reveals what modern frameworks often abstract away: connection handling, request parsing, protocol compliance, and maintaining performance under concurrent load. Inspired by Nginx, this project implements a scalable architecture using epoll to efficiently manage multiple client connections.

sections.title: Architecture & capabilities
sections.body: Developed in C++ (C++98), the server is built on non-blocking sockets combined with a multiplexed event loop for high-performance I/O. It supports core HTTP methods (GET, POST, DELETE), a flexible configuration system inspired by Nginx (routes, ports, error pages), and CGI execution for dynamic content (PHP, Python). Additional features include secure file uploads and strict request validation.

sections.title: What we learned
sections.body: This project provided a deep understanding of how web servers operate internally: managing concurrent connections, handling HTTP protocol details, and optimizing performance with event-driven architectures. It strengthened our skills in low-level programming, socket management, and debugging complex systems, while highlighting the trade-offs between performance, scalability, and code complexity.

highlights: Event-driven design with epoll for many concurrent connections
RFC-oriented HTTP parsing and response handling
CGI path for dynamic content and extensibility
Solid preparation for infrastructure and platform engineering roles

projects.title: Inception Project
projects.description: A system administration project focused on infrastructure virtualization. Deployed a multi-container environment using Docker Compose, featuring Nginx, WordPress, and MariaDB on a secure, isolated network.

seo.title: Docker Compose Stack | Inception Infrastructure Project | Devsign
seo.description: Multi-container WordPress stack with Nginx and MariaDB on isolated networks — Docker Compose infrastructure project with security-minded defaults.

detail.intro: Inception recreates a production-like environment using Docker, where multiple services are isolated, secured, and orchestrated together. The architecture includes a reverse proxy with SSL (HTTPS), application services, a database, and persistent storage — all connected through explicit Docker networking for full control and reliability.

sections.title: Containerization & security
sections.body: Each service runs in its own container, managed with Docker Compose for reproducibility and scalability. Nginx is configured as a reverse proxy with SSL certificates to secure traffic over HTTPS. Volumes ensure data persistence, while environment variables and custom configurations allow flexible deployment across environments.

sections.title: What we learned
sections.body: This project builds a strong DevOps foundation: understanding containerization, service isolation, networking, and secure communication. It also emphasizes reproducibility, showing how entire environments can be defined as code and redeployed consistently — a key practice in modern development, staging, and production workflows.

highlights: Containerized services with explicit dependencies
Isolated network boundaries between components
Foundations for CI/CD and environment parity conversations
Great fit for clients who need DevOps-aware engineering partners

projects.title: ft_transcendence
projects.description: A real-time multiplayer Pong platform featuring live matchmaking, social chat systems, and secure OAuth2 authentication. Built with a scalable architecture and seamless WebSocket communication.
projects.tech: TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Auth0, Docker, Node.js, Socket.io

seo.title: ft_transcendence | Real-Time Pong, OAuth2, WebSockets | Devsign
seo.description: Full-stack realtime platform: matchmaking, chat, OAuth2 authentication, PostgreSQL, Dockerized services, and Socket.io communication.

detail.intro: ft_transcendence is a full-stack realtime application combining modern TypeScript technologies with WebSockets to deliver interactive gameplay and live communication. The platform handles authenticated users, persistent game rooms, and low-latency messaging, backed by PostgreSQL for reliable data storage.

sections.title: Realtime architecture
sections.body: The system is designed around WebSocket communication for instant updates in gameplay and chat. It manages user authentication, matchmaking, and synchronized game states while ensuring data consistency through a PostgreSQL database. The architecture balances responsiveness with stability, even under concurrent usage.

sections.title: What we learned
sections.body: This project strengthened our expertise in building realtime systems: handling WebSocket connections, managing state synchronization, and ensuring low-latency communication. We also gained experience in full-stack TypeScript development, secure authentication, database design, and deploying scalable applications — key skills for modern products like live dashboards, collaborative tools, and messaging platforms.

highlights: Realtime gameplay and chat with scalable event patterns
Secure authentication flows with OAuth2 integration
Containerized deployment story for reproducible environments
End-to-end TypeScript/Node architecture with clear module boundaries

projects.title: Money Transfer & Currency Converter
projects.description: A fast and secure web app for transferring money and converting currencies worldwide. It offers real-time exchange rates, a simple interface, and reliable results for seamless international transactions.

seo.title: Currency Converter & Money Transfer Web App | APIs | Devsign
seo.description: Fintech-style web utility: live exchange rates, simple money transfer flows, and API-driven accuracy — built with JavaScript, Bootstrap, and robust error handling.

detail.intro: People expect financial tools to feel calm and precise. This app pairs a clean conversion experience with transfer-oriented flows, backed by live rates from external APIs and careful handling of edge cases like unavailable providers or stale data.

sections.title: Reliability & clarity
sections.body: Financial interfaces need explicit states: loading, success, failure, and refresh. We prioritized readable formatting for currencies and transparent messaging so users always know what number they are acting on.

highlights: Real-time rate retrieval via REST APIs
Responsive layout for phones and desktops
UX patterns suitable for fintech and ecommerce teams
Demonstrates API integration discipline end-to-end

projects.title: Hotel Technical Issue Manager
projects.description: A professional internal system for hotel maintenance. Streamlines issue reporting, automates email alerts via PHPMailer, and generates digital PDF reports for technical audits.

seo.title: Hotel Maintenance Ticketing System | PHP, MySQL, PDF | Devsign
seo.description: Internal hotel maintenance platform: issue reporting, PHPMailer alerts, MySQL records, and PDF audit reports — built for real operations teams.

detail.intro: Hotels cannot afford silent failures: broken HVAC, plumbing, or electrical issues need traceable tickets, accountable owners, and audit trails. This system digitizes the workflow from report to resolution — with email escalation when minutes matter.

sections.title: Operational impact
sections.body: Automated notifications reduce response time, while PDF exports support compliance conversations and vendor handoffs. The database model is built around statuses, timestamps, and clear ownership.

highlights: Structured issue lifecycle from report to closure
Email alerts for critical events and handoffs
PDF reporting for audits and management reviews
Practical example of business process automation

projects.title: Calucature Utility Tool
projects.description: A lightweight desktop utility built with Python, designed for fast and efficient technical calculations. Powered by a Tkinter-based GUI, it provides a simple, offline-first experience for handling repetitive mathematical tasks without the overhead of web applications.

seo.title: Calucature Desktop Utility | Python Tkinter GUI | Devsign
seo.description: Lightweight Python desktop tool with Tkinter GUI for fast technical calculations — offline utility software with a simple, focused workflow.

detail.intro: Not every problem belongs in the browser. Calucature was built as a focused Python desktop tool that opens instantly and performs calculations with speed and reliability. It transforms repetitive manual work into a smooth, keyboard-friendly workflow with a clean graphical interface.

sections.title: Desktop efficiency with Python
sections.body: Built using Python and Tkinter, the application delivers a native-like desktop experience with minimal resource usage. The interface is designed for clarity and speed, allowing users to perform calculations quickly without distractions. Its modular structure makes it easy to extend with new features or calculation logic as needs evolve.

sections.title: What we learned
sections.body: This project strengthened our understanding of Python for desktop applications, including GUI design, event-driven programming, and user interaction patterns. We also explored how to design efficient offline tools, optimize workflows for productivity, and structure code for scalability and maintainability in small but practical software solutions.

highlights: Native-feeling desktop experience with Python + Tkinter
Focused UX for repetitive technical workflows
Offline-first: no network dependency for core usage
Easy to extend with new calculation modules

portfolio_page.Warning: The professional projects are published with authorization. Additional projects are not included here to respect privacy.

whyChooseUs.title: Why collaborate with me?
whyChooseUs.subtitle: I don't just deliver code, I deliver outcomes. Here's what you can expect when we work together.

reasons.title: Outcome-Focused Delivery
reasons.text: Every decision design, tech stack, structure is tied to a real business goal: more traffic, higher conversions, or less manual work.

reasons.title: End-to-End Ownership
reasons.text: From first sketch to final deployment, I own the full build. No broken handoffs, no lost context just clean, consistent execution.

reasons.title: Built to Last & Scale
reasons.text: Modern architecture and clean code mean your product evolves with your ambitions not against them.

contact_page.heading: Let’s Build Something That Drives Results
contact_page.description: Have a project in mind or looking for a developer to collaborate with? I help businesses and teams design and build high-performance digital solutions — from websites to automation systems. Send me a message and I’ll get back to you shortly.
contact_page.subtitle: Tell me about your project

form.heading: Send a message
form.subheading: I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.successMessage: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.

errors.messageRequired: Message must be at least 10 characters

reasons.title: Clear & Simple Process
reasons.text: We define your goals, plan the solution, and move step by step with full transparency.

reasons.title: Reliable Delivery
reasons.text: Focused on building solutions that are fast, scalable, and ready for real use.

reasons.title: Long-Term Thinking
reasons.text: I build with maintainability and growth in mind, so your project lasts.
